name: sccgub-audit-ts
description: TypeScript port of the SCCGUB ceiling-immutability verifier (Patch-09 §C)
comments: Per PATCH_09.md §D.3 dependency policy: pure standard library only.
No third-party RUNTIME dependencies — `dependencies` is empty by design.
devDependencies (typescript, @types/node, tsx) are build/test tooling only;
they are not present in the published artifact's runtime path.
tsx is used to run TypeScript source directly with Node's built-in test runner
without a separate compile step in dev workflows; CI compiles via `tsc`.
